lines.hearsay: {place} was quiet in the way a workshop gets when two people are not speaking.
lines.gossip: {A} priced a job over {B}'s shoulder at {place} and said the number twice — everyone in that shop understood it but {B}, which was the point, and {A} was flat about it for the rest of the afternoon, which nobody expected including {A}.
lines.report: {A} entered a correction against {B}'s work at {place}, slot {slot}.
